text: Now let me carefully analyze the three largest and most complex functions I've found. Let me count branches in run_turn and ensure_server_ready:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "cat > /tmp/count_branches.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Count branches in run_turn (lines 296-514 in conversation.rs)
echo "=== run_turn (conversation.rs, lines 296-514) ==="
sed -n '296,514p' /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/conversation.rs | \
  grep -o "if\|else\|match\|for\|while\|&&\|||\|?\|=>\|\.map\|\.filter\|\.find" | wc -l
echo "Line count: 218"

# Count branches in observe (lines 201-334 in worker_boot.rs)
echo ""
echo "=== observe (worker_boot.rs, lines 201-334) ==="
sed -n '201,334p' /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/worker_boot.rs | \
  grep -o "if\|else\|match\|for\|while\|&&\|||\|?\|=>\|\.map\|\.filter\|\.find" | wc -l
echo "Line count: 133"

# Count branches in ensure_server_ready (lines 1046-1138 in mcp_stdio.rs)
echo ""
echo "=== ensure_server_ready (mcp_stdio.rs, lines 1046-1138) ==="
sed -n '1046,1138p' /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/mcp_stdio.rs | \
  grep -o "if\|else\|match\|for\|while\|&&\|||\|?\|=>\|\.map\|\.filter\|\.find" | wc -l
echo "Line count: 92"

# Count branches in grep_search (lines 342-449 in file_ops.rs)
echo ""
echo "=== grep_search (file_ops.rs, lines 342-449) ==="
sed -n '342,449p' /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/file_ops.rs | \
  grep -o "if\|else\|match\|for\|while\|&&\|||\|?\|=>\|\.map\|\.filter\|\.find" | wc -l
echo "Line count: 107"

# Count branches in discover_tools_for_server_once (lines 805-871 in mcp_stdio.rs)
echo ""
echo "=== discover_tools_for_server_once (mcp_stdio.rs, lines 805-871) ==="
sed -n '805,871p' /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/mcp_stdio.rs | \
  grep -o "if\|else\|match\|for\|while\|&&\|||\|?\|=>\|\.map\|\.filter\|\.find" | wc -l
echo "Line count: 66"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/count_branches.sh
bash /tmp/count_branches.sh
"}
